overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a rocky alien desert landscape with distinctive red-leaved trees and scattered boulders. The character walks steadily through the terrain, cresting ridges and eventually approaching a large crashed ship wreckage in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien desert landscape with large red trees and scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky terrain toward a prominent large red tree

entered.detail: tall tree with distinctive red foliage standing prominently on the left side of the path
massive gray rock formation rising on the left horizon
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon
uneven ground covered with rocks and reddish sand

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a wide-open alien desert landscape under a bright hazy sky. A large red tree dominates the left side of the frame while rocky outcrops and distant mountains fill the background. The terrain is uneven and covered with scattered stones.

events.description: character crests a ridge revealing twin pyramid-shaped rock formations in the distance

agents.ego_description: ascending a rocky ridge and continuing across the open plateau toward distant formations

entered.detail: two large pyramid-shaped boulders standing prominently on the horizon
cluster of smaller red-leaved trees scattered across the right side of the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character crests a ridge, revealing a wider vista with distinctive pyramid-shaped rock formations ahead. The large red tree from the previous segment falls behind as the terrain opens up into a plateau scattered with boulders and distant red vegetation.

events.description: crashed ship wreckage becomes visible on the horizon between the rocks

agents.ego_description: navigating through a field of large boulders while heading toward the distant wreckage

entered.detail: large metallic structure of a crashed ship visible in the far distance
scattered field of large gray boulders surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a boulder-strewn field where a crashed ship wreckage becomes visible on the horizon. The pyramid rocks pass behind as the focus shifts toward the distant metallic structure. The terrain remains rocky and barren with occasional red shrubs.

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the crashed ship wreckage which now dominates the view ahead

entered.detail: tall spire or mast structure protruding from the crashed ship wreckage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the crashed ship wreckage which now fills the center of the frame. A tall mast structure rises from the wreckage, and the details of the ship's hull become visible. The surrounding boulders give way to clearer ground as the destination is reached.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rocky alien desert that gradually transitions from a wide-open wilderness to the site of a massive crashed ship. It begins with the character walking past a dominant red tree under a bright hazy sky, navigating uneven terrain marked by scattered stones and distant mountains. As the character crests a ridge, the red tree falls behind and the vista expands into a plateau featuring distinctive pyramid-shaped rock formations. The scene then shifts through a boulder-strewn field where the pyramid rocks recede, bringing a distant metallic wreckage into focus amidst barren ground and red shrubs. Finally, the camera approaches the crashed ship as it fills the frame, revealing a tall mast and the detailed hull of the vessel.
